Anthropic dropped a major Claude Design update late at night, with one-click import of design systems, bidirectional code synchronization, and one-click export to nine major platforms. description: 海尔智家以智效能作为企业Agent OS，集研发、生产、供应、销售、服务于一体，让所有业务人员都可以构建自己的Agent。
titleZh: 制造业中的人工智能实施：海尔智能家居开创企业代理操作系统
titleEn: AI Implementation in Manufacturing: Haier Smart Home Pioneers with an Enterprise Agent OS
descriptionZh: 海尔智家以智效能作为企业Agent OS，集研发、生产、供应、销售、服务于一体，让所有业务人员都可以构建自己的Agent。
descriptionEn: Haier Smart Home uses Zhixiaoneng as its enterprise Agent OS, integrating R&D, production, supply, sales, and service, enabling all business personnel to build their own Agents. Tencent Cloud, leveraging ClawPro and its full-stack AI capabilities, provides models, computing power, security sandboxes, and engineering support, ensuring controllable operation of Agents in real manufacturing scenarios.

title: 从研发到数据审核：AI正在重塑游戏公司

titleEn: From R&D to Data Review: AI Is Reshaping Game Companies
descriptionZh: 游族互动与腾讯云WorkBuddy集成后，将其数据平台、信息系统、广告创意流程封装到Skills中，让业务团队一键部署。
descriptionEn: After integrating with Tencent Cloud’s WorkBuddy, Youzu Interactive encapsulated its data platform, information system, and ad creative pipeline into Skills, allowing business teams to deploy them with one click. From “one Agent per person” to full coverage of three major business scenarios, this game company’s AI transformation path is more thorough than most people imagine.
